Package com.shanebeestudios.vf.api.property

Class FurnaceProperties

java.lang.Object
com.shanebeestudios.vf.api.property.Properties
com.shanebeestudios.vf.api.property.FurnaceProperties
All Implemented Interfaces:
net.kyori.adventure.key.Keyed, ConfigurationSerializable, Keyed
public class FurnaceProperties extends Properties implements Keyed, ConfigurationSerializable
Properties for Furnaces

Used to manipulate the speed properties of a furnace

  • Field Details

    • FURNACE

      public static final FurnaceProperties FURNACE
      Pre-made property to mimic a vanilla Minecraft furnace

      Cook speed = 1.0
      Fuel speed = 1.0

    • BLAST_FURNACE

      public static final FurnaceProperties BLAST_FURNACE
      Pre-made property to mimic a vanilla Minecraft blast furnace

      Cook speed = 2.0
      Fuel speed = 1.0

    • SMOKER

      public static final FurnaceProperties SMOKER
      Pre-made property to mimic a vanilla Minecraft smoker

      Cook speed = 2.0
      Fuel speed = 1.0

    • cookMultiplier

      public FurnaceProperties cookMultiplier(double amount)
      Set the cook speed multiplier for this property
      Parameters:
      amount - Speed multiplier to set
      Returns:
      Returns an instance of itself with the speed multiplier changed
